series.title: The Midnight Detective
series.description_en: A gripping detective thriller set in the rain-soaked streets of Mumbai, where a brilliant but troubled investigator chases a ghost from his past.

series.title: Monsoon Hearts
series.description_en: A heartwarming family drama about three generations of a Tamil household navigating love, tradition, and modernity in present-day Chennai.

series.title: The Iron Road
series.description_en: An action-packed adventure following a fearless railway engineer who uncovers a massive conspiracy that threatens national security during the British Raj.

series.title: Strings of the Soul
series.description_en: A young woman from rural Bengal discovers her extraordinary musical talent and fights against all odds to make it to the national stage.

series.title: Digital Desi
series.description_en: A comedy series following five young software engineers from different states of India sharing a flat in Bengaluru, navigating startups, relationships, and cultural clashes.
